rationale: The confirmed US-Iran ceasefire and Strait of Hormuz reopening is a major confirmed policy outcome directly involving the US government, with potential positive impact on oil prices and geopolitical risk for American residents.

top_events.title: US, Iran announce ceasefire agreement; Strait of Hormuz reopening
top_events.summary: A confirmed US-Iran ceasefire with Hormuz reopening is a major new development directly involving US foreign policy, potentially lowering gas prices and reducing Middle East military risk for US forces. This is a qualitative shift from prior active tensions.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: Continuation of confirmed US airstrike operation against Tren de Aragua — already scored last cycle; no new qualitative escalation beyond the prior confirmed action.

top_events.title: Twelve killed in plane crash in US state of Missouri
top_events.summary: A confirmed deadly plane crash in Missouri is a domestic tragedy affecting US residents directly; aviation safety concern for Americans.
